about-intro:
Full Stack Developer with over 3 years of solid experience in the full software development lifecycle (SDLC).
Specialist in designing scalable architectures with Java (Spring Boot), .NET, and Node.js, and building modern interfaces with React.js and Next.js.
Expert in enterprise databases (SQL Server, Oracle) and Azure cloud deployment. Recognized for migrating legacy systems to microservices achieving 25% cost reduction.
about-tagline: I build scalable backend systems and dynamic frontend applications with a focus on clean code, design patterns, and performance.
